concepts.name: Vector Space
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors that is closed under addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Linear Independence
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors where no vector can be expressed as a linear combination of the others.

concepts.name: Span
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible linear combinations of a given set of vectors.

concepts.name: Basis
concepts.short_definition: A minimal set of vectors that spans a vector space and is linearly independent.

concepts.name: Dimension
concepts.short_definition: The number of vectors in any basis of a vector space.

concepts.name: Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: A function between vector spaces that preserves vector addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Image
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible output vectors of a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Kernel
concepts.short_definition: The set of all input vectors that map to the zero vector under a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Rank
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the image of a linear transformation or the dimension of the column space of a matrix.

concepts.name: Nullity
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the kernel of a linear transformation.
